_meta.description: Audit markers — tracks which files have been audited, when, and how many times. Future Claude Code sessions should read this file before auditing and increment the count.
_meta.usage: Before auditing a file, check if it has a marker. After auditing, update the marker. Higher auditCount = lower priority for re-audit.
_meta.format: { filepath: { auditCount, lastAuditDate, lastAuditSession, findings, status } }

lib/state.js.findings: Clean. atomicWriteSync for crash safety. debouncedSave(200ms, max 2s). All 71 achievement condition types implemented in evaluateAchievementCondition(). All tracking fields populated in route handlers.

lib/helpers.js.findings: gold sync centralized, variety bonus OK, rested XP OK

lib/auth.js.findings: separate secrets, fail-closed, revoked token pruning

server.js.findings: Clean. Security headers. Graceful shutdown with flush. Error handlers. Memory pruning. Force-save 60s.

app/page.tsx.findings: Dead lootDrop modal removed (30 lines). Dead questsCompletedToday + playerCompletedCount alias removed. Emoji violations fixed (sun, stopwatch). All lazy components have Suspense+ErrorBoundary. 4 modals without useModalBehavior noted (low impact).

app/utils.ts.findings: Level edge cases clean (XP 0, max level, negative). Fetch helpers return safe defaults. getValidToken returns expired without check (unused externally).

app/config.ts.findings: LOW: tome room minLevel 5 overridden by floor minLevel 8. Roadmap/changelog not in floor system (legacy). Otherwise clean.

routes/rift.js.findings: MED: /api/rift/extend missing player lock — added riftExtendLock. Rest is clean: all POST endpoints have locks, tavern-rest checks, level validation, cooldown checks, mythic anti-skip, weekly replay guard.. Cycle 2: verified all frontend calls use reviewApiKey

routes/config-admin.js.findings: Clean. GET-only batch endpoint, no mutations. Sensitive user fields correctly stripped (passwordHash, apiKey, refreshTokens, etc.). Rested XP live-calculated. Modifiers computed only for requesting player (perf optimization). NPC quest chain status correctly per-player. Weekly challenge + expedition correctly inlined.

routes/campaigns.js.findings: Clean. Player lock on claim, double-claim guard per-user, input XSS escaping, quest validation. PATCH/DELETE properly master-key gated.

routes/npcs-misc.js.findings: Clean. Feedback endpoint properly secured: server-set userId/timestamp, XSS escaping, 500-entry cap, admin-only GET/PATCH. NPC endpoints read-only. SPA fallback correct.

routes/docs.js.findings: Static OpenAPI spec object. No inputs, no logic. Clean.
